历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) only has public admission data for 2025 in the Physics Category of Shanxi Province, with a minimum ranking of approximately 724th, which is extremely high (top 0.4% in the province), reflecting the university's high recognition among top candidates in Shanxi. From 2021 to 2024, a complete trend cannot be formed, but the 2025 baseline ranking of 724th can serve as a core reference; the enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Shanxi Province is 2 students in 2025 and remains 2 students in 2026, with no expansion or reduction. The very small number of admissions means that ranking fluctuations are highly sensitive to changes in the number of applicants.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the HIT brand. Soft Science main ranking: HIT main campus ranked 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, remaining in the top 15 nationally in recent years, with the ranking rebounding to 12th in 2026, indicating a very high university level; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, and the attention for applications continues to rise. In 2024, there was a neutral/mixed signal in reputation (discussion on abnormal admission cutoffs), but it has stabilized by 2026; HIT has 17 A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering as A+, and Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering as A, with top-tier engineering strength. The Shenzhen campus offers engineering experimental classes (Computer and Electronic Communication, Autonomous Intelligence), directly corresponding to core advantageous disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology (A), Communication Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended/recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained high enthusiasm for applications. The number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 724th, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the 3.4% decrease in Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province slightly easing competition, the strong appeal of the HIT brand and Shenzhen campus location to top candidates, and the high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 714th, with a range of 664–764th.
